Name: Tom Easterling
Job Title: Director of the Chair and Chief Executive’s Office
Job/Team Function: To provide an effective and effective leadership support service to the Chairman, Non-Executive Directors and the Chief Executive  of NHS England to ensure that they are able to fulfill their governance, system and organisational leadership requirements.
Unit: Office of the Chair and Chief Executive
Notes: The team is too small to detail. The salary cost of direct reports has been included under Simon Stevens

Name: Simon Stevens
Job/Team Function: The Chief Executive is the Accounting Officer of NHS England, responsible to Parliament and the NHS England Board for the delivery of the NHS England Business Plan and providing leadership to NHS England to create the culture and conditions for health and care services and staff to deliver the highest standard of care and ensure that valuable public resources are used effectively to get the best outcomes for individuals, communities and society for now and for future generations.  NHS England also exists to provide system leadership to the NHS in partnership with other national NHS system leadership bodies and the Department of Health, ensuring the NHS Five Year Forward View can be delivered.
Unit: Office of the Chair and Chief Executive
Notes: Simon Stevens takes a voluntary 10% pay cut. Salary cost of direct reports also includes cost of direct reports from Matthew Swindells and Tom Easterling
